name: @ont/name-state-store
description: ONT durable enforced name-state store — node-targeted file store + the NameStateRecord/store types (live-enforcement LE-INDEX, LIVE_ENFORCEMENT_PLAN §2a). SHARED infra: the indexer writes (put) per accepted batched-claim name, the resolver reads (getByName). No consensus/firewall logic; persistence only — the loop decides, this stores.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/wire && vitest run
